title: eleocharis lereschii subsp. nebrodensis
intro: Eleocharis lereschii subsp. nebrodensis is a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the Eleocharis genus, commonly known as spike-rush. This plant is a type of sedge, characterized by its slender stems and tiny brown or black seeds. The medicinal properties of Eleocharis lereschii subsp. nebrodensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
